modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a field technician and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a short and minimally polite tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be a few minor typos and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Trouble accessing email on Mac after Duo MFA setup

full_description_text:  
Set up Duo MFA on my Mac. Now can't access my email. Need to configure the mail app to work with Duo. It's not syncing or letting me in.
short_description: Trouble accessing email on Mac after Duo MFA setup
description: Set up Duo MFA on my Mac. Now can't access my email. Need to configure the mail app to work with Duo. It's not syncing or letting me in.
